positive: A stylized, whimsical depiction of a cosmic forest biome. Central composition features bioluminescent flora, root systems forming delicate pathways, and gentle, amorphous glowing entities moving through the glowing undergrowth. The mood is ethereal and fantastical. Use deep sapphire blues, cosmic purples, neon mint greens, and warm glowing orbs for contrast. Style should be a clean, vector-art aesthetic mixed with detailed ink drawing, resembling Art Deco botanical illustrations with a sci-fi twist. High contrast silhouettes are key. Intricate line work, minimal noise, perfectly flat background suitable for apparel print, 8k, ultra-detailed.
negative: blurry, artifacts, text, watermark, logo, signature, cropped, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, sketch, oil paint, photorealistic, jpeg artifacts
